steps.title: Identify the directive
steps.content: The question stem is explicit: the student's goal is to emphasize a difference between the two lighthouse keepers.

steps.title: Apply the goal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice C identifies a specific difference: Betsy worked from 1862–1880 (1800s) while Thelma worked from 1925–1941 (1900s).

Choices A and B each focus on only one keeper without comparison, while D uses “both,” emphasizing similarity rather than difference.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
